title: Meaningful Design Group
tagline: Designing regenerative futures from Bali, Indonesia.
description: MDG is a design research and make company based in Bali, pioneering regenerative design, digital fabrication, and community innovation across Southeast Asia.
copyright: © 2022–2026 Meaningful Design Group. All rights reserved. Bali, Indonesia.

philosophy.title: Palemahan
philosophy.subtitle: Harmony with Nature
philosophy.text: Every project begins with the land — designing with ecosystems, not against them.

philosophy.title: Pawongan
philosophy.subtitle: Harmony with People
philosophy.text: Technology and culture are inseparable. We build with communities, not for them.

philosophy.title: Parahyangan
philosophy.subtitle: Harmony with Spirit
philosophy.text: Purpose-driven making. Every object, system, and space should carry meaning.

founders.name: Tomas Diez
founders.bio: Venezuelan urbanist and Executive Director of the Fab City Foundation. Founder of Fab Lab Barcelona at IAAC, co-creator of fablabs.io, and co-director of the Master in Design for Distributed Innovation. Now based in Bali, pioneering regenerative design across Southeast Asia.

founders.name: Agung Prianta
founders.bio: Balinese architect and cultural practitioner bridging traditional craftsmanship with digital fabrication.

founders.name: Ilham Habibie
founders.bio: Engineer, entrepreneur, and innovation leader. Founder of Ilthabi Rekatama and champion of Indonesia's knowledge economy and technology sovereignty.

founders.name: Wan Zaleha Radzi
founders.bio: Education innovator and policy leader working at the intersection of design, technology, and community empowerment across Southeast Asia.

team.name: Elaine Regina
team.bio: Driving human-centred design processes and creative innovation across MDG's projects and programs.

team.name: Tafia Sabila
team.bio: Shaping design strategy and collaborative innovation to build meaningful outcomes for communities.

team.name: I Wayan Arya Paramartha
team.bio: Building the digital infrastructure and fabrication systems that power MDG's projects and maker spaces.

team.name: I Komang Alit Krisna Putra
team.bio: Developing technology solutions and supporting the technical backbone of MDG's innovation ecosystem.

team.name: Vinny Vironika
team.bio: Keeping MDG's operations running smoothly and ensuring teams have everything they need to do great work.

team.name: Lukman Rizkika
team.bio: Connecting MDG with local communities, cultivating partnerships, and amplifying grassroots innovation.

team.name: Eka Prawira
team.bio: Providing strategic technical guidance to steer MDG's technology development and digital transformation.
